category_sources: Official MySQL documentation at https://dev.mysql.com/doc/ identifies the MySQL server documentation surface.
source_facts.description says MySQL is an open source relational database management system.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use MySQL as the product name.
docs_sources: Official MySQL documentation index is hosted at dev.mysql.com/doc.
The MySQL Reference Manual is the official server documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository README points users to dev.mysql.com/doc for documentation.
source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/mysql/mysql-server.
tags_sources: Official MySQL repository describes MySQL Server and MySQL Cluster.
source_facts.description and executable list identify a relational database server and CLI suite.
